UNLOCK_BASE: Provided for free by the Sun Corporation.
TURRET_GUNTURRET_DESC: Standard issue turret which fires bullets at targets.
TURRET_MACHINEGUNTURRET_DESC: Fires a rapid stream of bullets at enemies before overheating.
TURRET_SNIPERTURRET_DESC: Fires powerful shots that can instantly kill weaker enemies.
TURRET_SNIPERTURRET_UNLOCKCONDITION: Instantly kill an enemy with a sniper
TURRET_HEALTURRET_UNLOCKCONDITION: Heal an ally or yourself for {req} health
TURRET_COPYTURRET_DESC: Uses the gun of the player who placed it.
TURRET_RANDOMISETURRET_DESC: Fires a random status effect with every bullet.
TURRET_RANDOMISETURRET_UNLOCKCONDITION: Finish off a boss with a status tick
TURRET_STATUSTRAP_DESC: Applies multiple status effects to an enemy and then destroys itself.
TURRET_STATUSTRAP_UNLOCKCONDITION: Find a weapon with two status effects
TURRET_GRABBERTRAP_DESC: Grabs an enemy for a short time before destroying itself.
TURRET_SPIKETRAP_DESC: Deals damage to {activations} enemies before destroying itself.
TURRET_TELEPORTER_DESC: Sends enemies back to a previous point. Triggets {activations} per enemy.
TURRET_LOOTTURRET_DESC: Enemies killed within its radius have an increased drop rate.
TURRET_RESETTRAP_DESC: Sends an enemy back to spawn with half health and then destroys itself.
TURRET_RESETTRAP_UNLOCKCONDITION: Kill {req} enemies stuck in a Teleporter loop
TURRET_BEAMTURRET_DESC: Locks onto a distant enemy and deals low but constant beam damage.
TURRET_BEAMTURRET_UNLOCKCONDITION: Have a Sniper turret kill an enemy slowed by a Slow turret
TURRET_PULSETURRET_DESC: Periodically deals area of effect damage around itself.
TURRET_LINKPOINT_DESC: Links two points with a damaging beam that increases damage to enemies touching it.
TURRET_DROPTRAP_DESC: Drops a crushing piston from above onto enemies below, temporarily blocking their path.
TURRET_TRANSFORMER_DESC: Collects energy from nearby deaths and releases it every {firerate} seconds.
TURRET_CONVERTERTRAP_DESC: Transforms an enemy into a different type of enemy.
TURRET_CONVERTERTRAP_UNLOCKCONDITION: Random chance from killing an enemy
TURRET_BOMBTRAP_DESC: Periodically creates a bomb which deals area damage.
